title: Year Guesser: Science & Technology
description: Guess when these inventions and discoveries happened

questions.question: When was the telephone invented by Alexander Graham Bell?
questions.explanation: Bell patented the telephone on March 7, 1876.

questions.question: When was the World Wide Web invented?
questions.explanation: Tim Berners-Lee invented the World Wide Web in 1989 at CERN.

questions.question: When was the first iPhone released?
questions.explanation: Apple released the first iPhone on June 29, 2007.

questions.question: When did the Wright brothers achieve the first powered flight?
questions.explanation: The Wright brothers flew at Kitty Hawk on December 17, 1903.

questions.question: When was the first programmable computer (Z3) built?
questions.explanation: Konrad Zuse built the Z3, the world's first programmable computer, in 1941.

questions.question: When was electricity first generated commercially by Thomas Edison?
questions.explanation: Edison opened the Pearl Street Station in New York in 1882.

questions.question: When was DNA's double helix structure discovered?
questions.explanation: Watson and Crick published their discovery of the DNA structure in 1953.

questions.question: When was the printing press invented by Gutenberg?
questions.explanation: Johannes Gutenberg invented the movable-type printing press around 1440.

questions.question: When was the first nuclear reactor (Chicago Pile-1) activated?
questions.explanation: Chicago Pile-1 achieved the first self-sustaining nuclear chain reaction on December 2, 1942.

questions.question: When was the television demonstrated publicly for the first time?
questions.explanation: John Logie Baird demonstrated a working television in 1926.

questions.question: When was the first email sent?
questions.explanation: Ray Tomlinson sent the first email in 1971 using ARPANET.

questions.question: When was the steam engine patented by James Watt?
questions.explanation: Watt patented his improved steam engine in 1769.

questions.question: When did Google launch?
questions.explanation: Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin on September 4, 1998.

questions.question: When was the Hubble Space Telescope launched?
questions.explanation: Hubble was launched aboard the Space Shuttle Discovery on April 24, 1990.
